race.comment: HK-import ORIENTAL SMOKE (6) caught the eye fresh at Bendigo then burst through second-up to score on the Heath. Peaking now and draws the A1 for Crowther. Can make it two on the bounce. MYSTIC WONDER (9) is as consistent as they come and gets a nice drop in grade here. Was a good winner over this track and trip three back and will appreciate reuniting with Holder. Clear danger. BRAVE STAR (12) doesn't win out of turn but has built nicely into this prep and could be ready to put it all together. Loves the wet. YAM (3) just missed when resuming but went on with the job nicely last time. Strips fitter again and should be blending in nicely from the draw.
